No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on advanced financial computing, not directly on poverty eradication or ensuring access to financial services for the poor and vulnerable.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3), develops technical skills for employment (4.4), and includes 'sustainability considerations' (4.7) as a core competence.
evidence: 提高學生的程式能力和模型建構能力

Gender Equality.reason: The course does not contain any explicit or strong inferred links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops high-value skills in financial computing, supporting technological upgrading (8.2) and strengthening financial institutions (8.10) for economic growth.
evidence: 適合用於開發複雜的數量財務相關領域應用

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances technological capabilities and innovation (9.5) in the financial industry through C++ programming and model building.
evidence: 運用數學、統計、電腦科學等知識來解決金融問題

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Skills in financial computing and ethics could indirectly support improved regulation and monitoring of financial markets (10.5), contributing to stability.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course explicitly includes 'sustainability considerations' as a core competence, aligning with encouraging sustainable corporate practices (12.6).

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to climate change or climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Financial computing skills combined with ethical understanding could indirectly contribute to combating illicit financial flows and corruption (16.4, 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances the use of enabling technology (C++) (17.8) and builds capacity for data modeling, supporting statistical measurement of progress (17.19).
